title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
